analysis.ambiguity1: Barcode scanning request is vague. Scanning only gives raw ISBN numbers, not book metadata. It fails to specify which third-party API (e.g., Google Books) to use for decoding ISBNs into Titles/Authors, and lacks a fallback UI for unrecognised barcodes.
analysis.ambiguity2: The auction request is vague. It lacks rules for bidding duration, minimum increments, and bid retractions. Also, since in-app payments are forbidden by Legal, it doesn't specify how defaults are handled if a winning bidder refuses to pay.
